Open.Name: Open Claim the Moment
Open.Hint: Open or bring forward the shared Claim the Moment window.

Claim.Name: Claim the Spotlight
Claim.Hint: Claim an open spotlight when you are an eligible player.

State.Name: Spotlight State
State.Hint: Persistent shared state for Claim the Moment.

Countdown.Name: Spotlight Countdown
Countdown.Hint: How many seconds players have to claim the spotlight before it is assigned automatically.

SoundEnabled.Name: Play Throw Alert
SoundEnabled.Hint: Play the shared cinematic alert for everyone when the GM throws the spotlight.

SoundPath.Name: Throw Alert Sound
SoundPath.Hint: Choose or upload the audio file played when the spotlight is thrown.

PlayerClaimSoundEnabled.Name: Play Player Claim Horn
PlayerClaimSoundEnabled.Hint: Play a shared heroic horn when a player claims the spotlight before time expires.

PlayerClaimSoundPath.Name: Player Claim Horn
PlayerClaimSoundPath.Hint: Choose or upload the heroic audio file played when a player claims the spotlight.

AutoSelectSoundEnabled.Name: Play Automatic Selection Cue
AutoSelectSoundEnabled.Hint: Play a shared cue when the countdown expires and the system selects a player automatically.

AutoSelectSoundPath.Name: Automatic Selection Cue
AutoSelectSoundPath.Hint: Choose or upload the audio file played when the system automatically selects a player.

GMTakeSoundEnabled.Name: Play GM Danger Horn
GMTakeSoundEnabled.Hint: Play a shared foreboding horn when the GM takes the spotlight.

GMTakeSoundPath.Name: GM Danger Horn
GMTakeSoundPath.Hint: Choose or upload the danger audio file played when the GM takes the spotlight.

GMIcon.Name: GM Spotlight Icon
GMIcon.Hint: Choose or upload the image shown when the GM takes the spotlight.

SoundVolume.Name: Claim the Moment Volume
SoundVolume.Hint: Your personal Claim the Moment playback volume for this world.

ShowWelcome.Name: Show Welcome on Login
ShowWelcome.Hint: Show the Claim the Moment quick-start message when you enter this world.

Status.CountdownAnnouncement: {seconds} seconds remaining to claim the spotlight.
Status.OpenHint: The first eligible player to claim wins the spotlight.
Status.AutomaticWinner: No one claimed in time, so the fairest next player was selected.
Status.HandedWinner: The GM handed them the moment directly.
Status.ClaimedWinner: They reached for the moment first.
Status.GMTakenWinner: The GM has taken the spotlight to move the scene forward.
Status.ReadyHint: The GM can throw it to the table when the next moment opens.
Status.NoWinnerHint: Bring at least one online player into contention, then throw again.

Actions.GMActionHint: Throw it to the players, or take it immediately to move the scene forward.
Actions.ClaimHint: Only the first eligible claim is counted.
Actions.Help: How to use Claim the Moment

Roster.Title: Online Players
Roster.EmptyGM: No players are online yet. Ask a player to join this world, then bring them into contention.

Readiness.NoOnlinePlayers: Throw is unavailable because no players are online.
Readiness.NoEligiblePlayers: Throw is unavailable because every online player is out of contention.
Readiness.EnablePlayer: Nobody is in contention. Turn on at least one player toggle before throwing the spotlight.
Readiness.WaitForGM: Nobody is currently in contention. The GM can bring players into the next spotlight throw.

GMTools.Title: GM controls
GMTools.Hint: Set contention, edit totals, or reset all.

Reset.Title: Reset Spotlight Claims
Reset.Confirm: Reset every player's spotlight claim total to zero? This cannot be undone.

Help.Title: Claim the Moment Help
Help.Heading: Pass the spotlight with purpose
Help.Intro: Claim the Moment gives everyone a clear way to see, offer, claim, and balance narrative focus.

Opening.Title: Where to find it
Opening.Body: Every GM and player can open the window from Foundry's scene-controls bar on the left.
Opening.AutoOpen: When the GM throws the spotlight, the window also opens automatically for every eligible online player.
Opening.Keybindings: Defaults: Shift+M opens the window and Shift+C claims an available spotlight. Change either under Configure Controls.

Welcome.Title: Welcome reminder
Welcome.Body: The welcome window explains how to open Claim the Moment when you enter this world. If you previously selected Don't show this again, you can restore it here.

GM.Title: GM quick start
GM.StepOne: Set each online player's contention toggle.
GM.StepTwo: Throw the spotlight to start the shared countdown, or take it immediately for the GM.
GM.StepThree: Use the hand button to give the spotlight directly to an eligible player.
GM.StepFour: Correct totals directly when needed; use Reset All only when beginning a fresh count.

Player.Title: Player quick start
Player.StepOne: Check whether your roster row is in contention or greyed out.
Player.StepTwo: When the moment opens, select Claim the Spotlight before the countdown ends.
Player.StepThree: If nobody claims, the fairest eligible player is selected automatically.

Fairness.Title: How the fallback works
Fairness.Body: The system chooses among eligible online players with the lowest spotlight total and breaks ties randomly. The previous player winner is skipped by the next automatic fallback, but can still claim manually.

Volume.Title: Your sound, your choice
Volume.Body: The sound button in the bottom-right controls only your Claim the Moment volume. Taking it to zero silences the module for you without affecting the table.

Help.FullGuide: Need the complete rules, settings, and troubleshooting guide?

Credits.Title: Claim the Moment Credits & Licenses
Credits.Heading: Credits & licenses
Credits.Intro: Claim the Moment gratefully uses the following openly licensed artwork and audio. Each credit links to its original source and license.
Credits.NoAI: Claim the Moment did not use generative AI to create or adapt any bundled asset.

Notes.GMIcon: Adapted with a pale lavender foreground on a dark purple background; the PNG is a rasterization of the recolored SVG.
Notes.UnchangedPreview: Used as the unchanged published high-quality preview.
Notes.GMTake: Adapted by removing 1.137 seconds of leading silence and re-encoding as MP3; no other creative changes were made.

Credits.Packaged: A complete attribution document is also included with every module installation.

Onboarding.Title: Welcome to Claim the Moment
Onboarding.Intro: Claim the Moment is ready for this world.
Onboarding.OpenPath: Open Token Controls on the left, then select the Claim the Moment button whenever you need the spotlight window.
Onboarding.GMBody: Set who is in contention, then throw the spotlight to open a countdown for eligible players.
Onboarding.PlayerBody: When you are in contention, the window opens automatically when the GM throws the spotlight—but you can open it manually at any time.

Notifications.GMRequired: An active GM is required to manage the spotlight.
Notifications.NoEligibleAtDeadline: The countdown ended with no eligible players online.
Notifications.OperationFailed: Claim the Moment could not complete that action. Check the console for details.
Notifications.RequestTimedOut: Claim the Moment did not receive a response from the GM. Try again.
Notifications.InitializationFailed: Claim the Moment could not initialize. Reload the world or check the console for details.
